notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds out, second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo singles on a ground ball to center fielder Zack Gelof. Adley Rutschman scores.
